channel.title: Trino on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Trino on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Trino Source
item.description:
About

Trino is a distributed SQL query engine designed for fast analytic queries against data of any size. It allows you to query data where it lives, including Hive, Cassandra, relational databases or even proprietary data stores.

Available Tools

Trino Source Tools

Tool Name Description
trino-execute-sql A "trino-execute-sql" tool executes a SQL statement against a Trino database.
trino-sql A "trino-sql" tool executes a pre-defined SQL statement against a Trino database.

Requirements

Trino Cluster

You need access to a running Trino cluster with appropriate user permissions for the catalogs and schemas you want to query.
